titleStmt.title: SII 22.297: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 297. (A.R. No. 297 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE WEST AND NORTH WALLS OF THE FIRST PRĀKĀRA. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—30th YEAR (A.D. 1041-42)

summary.p: This begins with introduction Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc. It registers a sale of 3000 kuḻi of land by the sabhā of Kūram alias Śōḻamārttāṇḍa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Nīrvēḷūr-nāḍu a division of Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam to the temple at Tirumālpēṟu, for a sum of 36 Rājarājaṉ kāśu endowed to the temple by Daṇḍanāyakaṉ Sōman Kumaraṉ alias Madhurāntaka-Mārāyaṉ, an officer of the royal treasury to provide for 75 kalam of paddy, with which to meet the expenses of the daily supply of tumbai flowers for the god, to feed two Śivayōgins in the temple after the midday worship and for other requirements. The payment is said to have been made to the sabhā by the donor to include the several taxes on the land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaśśivāya svasti śrī . tiruma[ ṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyap] pāvaiyum cirttanic celviyum taṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭitiyalūḻiyuḷ ḷiṭaituṟaiṉāṭuntuṭarvaṉa velippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraicar tam muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaro pakkal ten Eṟipaṭai keraḷaṉ mu
ṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatir mālai tolperuṅkāvai palpaḻan=tivum ceruvil ciṉavil Irupattorukāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭa parācirāmaṉ melvarum cāntimattivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟirutakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika viyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta caya ciṅkaṉ Aḷapurum pukaḻoṭum piṭi Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai yilakkamum navanetikula peru malaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭai vaḷa ṉāmaṇai koṇaiyum
veñcilaivira pañcapaḷḷiyum pācaṭai paḻan mācuṇitecamum Ayaṟvil vaṇ kirtti yātiniṟaivayil can=tiraṉ tolkulat tin=tira rataṉai viḷaiyamaṟ kaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭarum ceṟimiḷaiyoṭṭar viṣayamum pūcurarcer naṟkocalaiṉāṭum tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇura tākki tikkaṇaikirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻin=toṭa taṅkāta cāral veṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaṭal caṅkuvoṭṭal mahivāḷaṉai veñcamarviḷā
kattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭumkaṭaluttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirtta teripuṉalkaṅkaiyum Alai kaṭal naṭuvoṭ palakalam celutti caṅkirāmavijayar tuṅkapanmanākiya kiṭārat taraicaṉai vākayam porukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭum Akappaṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya peruniti piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉ Akanakar portoḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamu moyttoḷi puṉaimaṇiputavamum kaṉamaṇikatavamum niṟaijivijayamum tuṟainirpaṉṉaiyum vaṉmalaiyūre
yil toṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācopamum kāpuṟu niṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamum kāvalampuricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaipañcuṟuṭai vaḷappañcūṟum kalaitakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamum tirumā valviṉai mārumaliṅkamum kalāmutirkaṭuntiṟa lilāmuṟitecamum tenakkalar poḻil māṉakkavāramum toṭukaṭalkāval kaṭumuraḷkaṭāramu māporum taṇṭāl koṇṭa koparakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḷadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10Āvatu jayaṅko
ṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu koṭṭattu nirveḷūr nāṭṭuk kūramāṉa coḻamāttāṇṭac caturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttuc ciṟutaṉattup peruntaṉam taṇṭanāyakam taṇṭanāyakam comaṉ kumaraṉāṉa maturāntakamārāyaṉ tāmaṟkoṭṭattu valla nāṭṭut tirumāṟpeṟu Uṭai yāṟkkut tumpaittiruppaḷḷittāman nāḻiyiṉukku I4yum Uṭaiyār Uccippotai sandhiyil tirupparikalameṟiṉavāṟe Iraṇṭu śivayogikaḷukku
ṭikku Uṇṇakkaṭavārkaḷāka takku patiṉmuṉṟukkum neykkum morukkum pākku veṟṟilaikkum I patakkum Āka I patakku munnāḻiyāka Orāṇṭiṉukku nellu Arumoḻiteva marakkālāl Eḻupattaiṅkalattukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūr koyil kumiḻittūmpāl nirpāytti viḷaiyum nilattu muvāyiraṅ kuḻi viṟṟukkuṭutta paricāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai Eyiṟkoṭṭattu Eyilnāṭṭup peruṅ karumpū rellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai peruṅkarumpūrerikkup pā
ynta Āṟṟukkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai nāṅkaḷ kalluṅkaraikalluṅ kaḷḷiyum naṭṭu varampaṭṭikkuṭutta peruvarampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai koṭṭattup puricaināṭṭup putuppākkattu Ellaikkal
lukku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam Uṭpāḻoḻiviṉṟi mikutikkuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṉṉilattukku Iṟai dravyattukkum kraya dravyattukkum koṇṭa rājarājaṉ kācu 3 10 6 Ikkācu muppattāṟum Aṟakko
ṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Innilattāl vanta putaṟpoṉ pañcavāram cilliṟai coṟu māṭṭuveṭṭi Amañci niriṟai pulamiṟai maṟṟum koyil vācaliṟ pontatepporppaṭṭatum nāṅkaḷe yiṟuttu Ippūmi cuṭṭi Uḻutakuṭiyai Epperpaṭṭa
tuvuṅ kāṭṭappeṟātatākavum Ipparicu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu śilālekai ceytukuṭuttom kūramāṉa coḻamāttāṇṭa caturvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom .
Digital edition of SII 22.297 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
